C1310A Acute Mental Status Change CHAR 1 Indicates whether there has been an acute change in mental status from the resident's baseline. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No
 1=Yes
 ^=Blank(skip pattern) effective10/01/2016
641 C1310B_INTNTN_IND C1310B_INTNTN_IND C1310B Signs and Symptoms of Delirium: Inattention CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident exhibits signs and symptoms of inattention. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=Behavior not present
 1=Behavior continuously present, does not
